privileged_info_summary: Patient Fatima Al-Hassan (DOB: August 9, 1978) is a synthetic patient record in the OSCAR EMR environment. The task requires three clinical actions: (1) discontinuing an incorrectly entered Amiodarone 200mg prescription (initially active in her chart), (2) adding an ASA (Acetylsalicylic Acid) allergy with documented reaction (Gastrointestinal upset) and moderate severity, and (3) prescribing a new medication (Metformin 500mg twice daily). The OSCAR EMR system is accessed via http://localhost:8080/oscar/login.jsp with default credentials (username: oscardoc, password: oscar, PIN: 1117). All patient data and initial medication records are synthetic, generated by seed_patients.sql and setup scripts, not from real patient sources. Task verification uses database queries to confirm prescription status changes (archived/active flags) and presence of allergy and medication records.
